zh.lifeSummary: 當Emmeline d'Abetot於大約1076年出生在英國武斯特斯爾伍斯特時，她的父親Urse d'Abetot37歲，母親Athelisa de Normandy31歲。她於1104年之前與Walter de Beauchamp結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1123年在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

nameMeanings.name: Emmeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. In origin it seems to have been a derivative of   Emma  , but when it was revived in the 19th century there was some confusion with   Emily .  It was born by the suffragette  Emmeline Pankhurst  (  1858–1928 ), mother of  Christabel  and  Sylvia .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Emmeline d'Abetot was born about 1076, in Worcester, Worcestershire, England, her father, Urse d'Abetot, was 37 and her mother, Athelisa de Normandy, was 31. She married Walter de Beauchamp before 1104. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1123, in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 49, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emmeline d'Abetot est née environ 1076, à Worcester, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Urse d'Abetot, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Athelisa de Normandy, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Walter de Beauchamp avant 1104. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1123, à Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emmeline d'Abetot um 1076 in Worcester, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Urse d'Abetot 37 und ihre Mutter Athelisa de Normandy 31. Sie hat vor 1104 Walter de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1123 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lei sposato Walter de Beauchamp prima del 1104. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1123, nel Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Emmeline d'Abetotが約1076年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウオルセスターで生まれた時，父Urse d'Abetotは37歳，母Athelisa de Normandyは31歳であった。1104年以前にWalter de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1123年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエルムリー カストルで49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Emmeline d'Abetot(이)가 대략 1076년 영국 워스스터실르 워스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Urse d'Abetot(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Athelisa de Normandy(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1104년 이전 Walter de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1123년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 엘리 카스틀에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Emmeline d'Abetot nasceu aproximadamente 1076, em Worcester, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Urse d'Abetot, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Athelisa de Normandy, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter de Beauchamp antes 1104. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1123, em Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emmeline d'Abetot родилась около 1076 г. в местности ворсестир, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Urse d'Abetot было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Athelisa de Normandy, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter de Beauchamp перед 1104 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1123 г. в местности элмли кастл, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.
